title: TheElementGuy's More Metals and Ores
description: More ores! More materials! Vanilla-like! Updated for 26.1.2!
body: Have you ever searched for a mod that simply adds new materials—only to find ones packed with extra mechanics, flashy animated textures, or over-the-top tools like instant tree choppers and _pickaxovels_? Yeah…this mod ain't that. If you're looking for high-tech gadgets and magical machines, this probably isn't the mod for you. But if you want a clean, vanilla-style expansion that fits naturally into Minecraft’s core gameplay, you’re in the right place. Keep reading. This mod adds: * Cubic Zirconia * Bronze\* - crafted from copper and tin * Bloodstone * Tenumbrum * Rubidium * Starshard * Aquamarine | Material |Tier |Attack Damage Bonus |Armor Strength (Total) |Durability |Mining Speed |Dimension | | -------------- |---------------- |------------------- |---------------------- |---------- |------------ |------------------------------- | | Cubic Zirconia |Iron |2 |15 |2501 |7 |Overworld (-48 - 140) | | Bronze |Stone |1 |12 |100 |5 |Tin in Overworld (-16 - 48) | | Bloodstone |Stone |4 |10 |571 |4 |Overworld (-60 - 56) | | Tenumbrum |Diamond |3 |20 |1641 |8.5 |Overworld (-60 - 36) | | Rubidium |Netherite |4 |20 |1831 |12 |Nether (20 - 56) | | Starshard |Beyond Netherite |5 |22 |3001 |15 | Outer End Islands | | Aquamarine |Iron |3 |17 |276 |5.5 |Overworld, in the sea (30 - 58) | To mine: Cubic Zirconia - stone Bloodstone - stone Tenumbrum - iron Rubidium - diamond Starshard - netherite Aquamarine - stone \*Bronze is only in 1.X and 3.X versions. ## Versions in the format of 21.X.X.X require TEG Mat Lib. ### Addons: [**Celestial Bronze**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/theelementguys-more-metals-and-ores-celestial) – A mythical metal with divine origins, Celestial Bronze is a rare and powerful alloy known for its shimmering hue and formidable strength. Ideal for crafting advanced tools, weapons, and armor, it integrates seamlessly into the world without feeling overpowered. Whether you're battling hostile mobs or exploring ancient ruins, Celestial Bronze offers both function and flair, staying true to Minecraft’s vanilla spirit while adding a touch of mythological magic. [**Visible Ores**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/theelementguys-more-metals-and-ores-visible-ores) – Inspired by the Vanilla Tweaks aesthetic, Visible Ores enhances the clarity and visibility of ore blocks by subtly outlining them or adjusting their background textures. It doesn't change how ores function or look radically—just enough to make mining more intuitive and less frustrating, especially in low-light environments. This tweak preserves Minecraft’s core visual style while improving gameplay quality for resource gatherers. Supported versions: 26.1.X are currently the only versions fully supported. There are also versions for 1.21, 1.21.4, and 1.21.11, but they are no longer updated. Versions 1.21.3 and 1.21.5-10 also have versions, but they are even less updated.undefined FAQ: Q: When will version X come out? A: When you ask for it. Q: When will version X be updated? A: When you ask for it. Q: Can I put this in my modpack? A: Sure. Notes/Bulletin Board: **Check the Curseforge page for this mod to find older versions.** Want to try a new take on the textures? Go for it! Please use the issue tracker! Please give feedback!
